report.summary: UX audit and polish of 5 recent pages — added Breadcrumb navigation, created OG images, fixed accessibility, and extracted proper server/client component separation for SEO metadata.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added Breadcrumb navigation to gamification page (was missing entirely)
Added Breadcrumb navigation to courses page (was missing entirely)
Added Breadcrumb navigation to notifications page (client component, was missing)
Replaced manual breadcrumb in portfolio-tracker with proper Breadcrumb component
Added keyboard navigation (tabIndex, onKeyDown) to notification subscription toggles
Added keyboard navigation and click-to-mark-read on individual notification items
Added role='button' and proper ARIA labels to notification items with read/unread state
Increased checkbox touch targets from 16px to 20px in notification settings
Added transition animation to notification items for smoother hover feedback
Extracted NotificationsClient from page.tsx to enable server-side metadata export
Extracted PortfolioTrackerClient from page.tsx to enable server-side metadata export

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: notifications (1200x630) — bell icon with notification badges, mock alerts
OG image: portfolio-tracker (1200x630) — portfolio chart, chain badges, token list preview

sections.title: SEO Metadata Added
items: notifications/page.tsx — full Metadata export with title, description, openGraph, twitter
portfolio-tracker/page.tsx — full Metadata export with title, description, openGraph, twitter

sections.title: Accessibility Fixes
items: Notification subscription cards: added tabIndex=0, keyboard Enter/Space toggle
Notification items: added role=button, tabIndex=0, keyboard Enter/Space to mark read
Improved ARIA labels to include read/unread state and timestamp
Checkbox inputs: increased from 16px to 20px minimum dimensions
